caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with colorful embroidery. The man is holding a microphone close to his mouth, suggesting he is singing or speaking. A guitar is partially visible, indicating that he might be playing it as part of his performance. The background consists of wooden blinds, and the heads of several audience members can be seen in the foreground, attentively watching the performer. The setting appears to be indoors, possibly in a small concert hall or community center. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen.
